**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Chutian Cultural and Creative Group Co., Ltd. is an extremely exaggerated 'Frankenstein' sample of a 'shell company/qualification shell.' The deeply hypocritical Apple Inc. electronic hardware manufacturing hegemony data at the bottom layer has been completely destroyed by the engine. The official commercial system stiffly categorized it into 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing' due to the 'electronic component manufacturing' used as filler in the latter half of its license. However, the engine's cross-scan instantly saw through this farce: this is a micro shell enterprise with 'Cultural and Creative Group' in its name, claiming a registered capital of 51.66 million, but with an actual paid-in amount of only 170,000, and a 2024 insured headcount of '0 people.' The most magical part is its physical coordinates—'Room 101, Building 56' in Nanjing Yushuiwan Garden (a typical residential community). On the first floor of a residential building, relying on 0 employees, this company claims it can not only 'produce TV dramas and distribute movies' but also engage in 'power generation and transmission businesses,' and even 'manufacture radio and television equipment and power electronic components.' This is simply stuffing an entire industry chain into a first-floor residence. Diagnostic conclusion: this is an extremely typical 'Invoice Shell' or 'Cultural Media Project Routing SPV.' The boss (Zhu Meijuan) wrote cultural media, power engineering, film and television production, and electronic equipment sales all into the license just to have unimpeded access when taking on freelance work, routing funds, or acting as an invoicing proxy; it inherently possesses no physical manufacturing or film/TV production capability.
